name: Bumetanide
executiveSummary: Loop diuretic that is more potent than furosemide, mg for mg; useful in cases of furosemide resistance.
indications:
## Indications

- Edema in heart failure (HF), cirrhosis, and chronic kidney disease (CKD) when potent diuresis is required.

## Precautions

- Hypokalemia and hypovolemia. Adjust in severe liver disease.

> Adjust per institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 0.5–1 mg IV/IM; repeat based on response (1 mg ≈ 40 mg of furosemide).

stability:
## Stability

- Use after withdrawal; no standard dilution required.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. ACLS / PALS / NRP Guidelines.
ANMAT. Información de medicamentos y prospectos autorizados en Argentina.
Society of Critical Care Medicine (SCCM). Guías de medicación en UCI.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
